summary: Bug Fix Verified: Compliance Centre certificates modal layout overflow and certificate expiry logic. All features working correctly - conditional expiry labels, 'Valid until replaced' helper text, modal layout at various viewport widths.

issues: Minor: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/compliance/insurance returns requires_expiry_date and valid_until_replaced fields
✅ Backend: Company Registration Certificate has requires_expiry_date=false, valid_until_replaced=true
✅ Backend: Employer's Liability Insurance has requires_expiry_date=true, valid_until_replaced=false
✅ Backend: CQC Registration Certificate has requires_expiry_date=false, valid_until_replaced=true
✅ Backend: Legionella Risk Assessment has requires_expiry_date=false
✅ Backend: Food Hygiene Rating Certificate has requires_expiry_date=false, valid_until_replaced=true
✅ Backend: Asbestos Survey Report has requires_expiry_date=false, valid_until_replaced=true
✅ Backend: Upload without expiry date fails for certificates that require expiry (400 error)
✅ Backend: Upload without expiry date succeeds for certificates that don't require expiry
✅ Frontend: CQC Registration upload modal shows 'Expiry Date (optional)' label
✅ Frontend: CQC Registration upload modal shows 'Valid until replaced — no expiry date required' helper text
✅ Frontend: Employer's Liability upload modal shows 'Expiry Date *' (required) label
✅ Frontend: Employer's Liability upload modal does NOT show 'Valid until replaced' helper text
✅ Frontend: Modal buttons (Cancel, Upload) visible inside modal at 1920px viewport
✅ Frontend: Modal buttons visible at 800px viewport width (no overflow)
✅ Frontend: Company Registration Amendment dialog shows 'Expiry Date (optional)' label
✅ Frontend: Company Registration Amendment dialog shows 'Valid until replaced' helper text
✅ Frontend: Public Liability Amendment dialog shows 'Expiry Date' (required) label
✅ Frontend: Public Liability Amendment dialog does NOT show 'Valid until replaced' helper text
critical_code_review_comments: InsuranceDocResponse Pydantic model correctly includes requires_expiry_date and valid_until_replaced fields (line 3658-3659)
Upload endpoint correctly validates expiry_date based on requires_expiry_date flag (line 14095-14097)
Frontend upload dialog correctly renders conditional expiry field based on selectedInsurance.requires_expiry_date (line 2392)
Frontend shows 'Valid until replaced' helper text when selectedInsurance.valid_until_replaced is true (line 2412-2417)
Amendment dialog correctly shows conditional expiry label based on amendRecord.requires_expiry_date (line 2681-2683)
Modal CSS uses max-w-lg w-[95vw] max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto for proper responsive layout (line 2343)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded insurance/certificate data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Certificate expiry logic bug fix verified. The Compliance Centre now correctly shows conditional expiry date labels ('Expiry Date (optional)' vs 'Expiry Date *') and 'Valid until replaced' helper text based on certificate type. Modal layouts are responsive and don't overflow at various viewport widths. Backend correctly validates expiry date requirements during upload.
